title: Writing a story
explanation:
Writing a short story (A2)

Use past tenses to tell a sequence of events:

  • Set the scene: Last summer, …
  • Use past simple for main events
  • Use past continuous for background: I was walking when …
  • End with a comment or feeling

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the best sentence for a story.

questions.text: Opening: [*Last year, I went on holiday to Spain.|Last year, I go holiday Spain.|Holiday Spain last year I go.]
Background: [*It was raining when we arrived.|It rained when we arriving.|Rain when arrive.]
Sequence: [*First we checked in. Then we explored the city.|First check in. Explore city. Then.]
Ending: [*It was the best holiday ever.|Best holiday. The end. Finish.]
While I ____, I met an old friend. | *was shopping | shopped | shop
Suddenly, the lights ____ out. | *went | were going | go
We ____ very tired but happy. | *were | was | are
In the end, everything ____ fine. | *was | were | is
[*After that, we decided to go home.|After home go we.|That after home.]
[*We didn't expect the ending.|We not expect ending.|Expect not ending we.]
[*Luckily, nobody was hurt.|Luckily hurt nobody was not.|Hurt nobody.]
Linking word for contrast: [*However,|And but|So because]
